Terms

Terms of Use

The rules for accounts, contributions, reviews, photos, and rewards.

Last updated: June 15, 2026

Acceptance of these terms

These Terms of Use govern your access to and use of Open Play Map, operated by Scoop Pickleball. By using the site or creating an account, you agree to these terms, the Privacy Policy, Community Guidelines, and any additional rules shown in the service.

If you do not agree, do not use the site.

Accounts

  • You must provide accurate account information and keep your login credentials secure.
  • You are responsible for activity that happens through your account.
  • You may not create accounts to impersonate someone, evade moderation, spam the service, or manipulate rewards.
  • You must be at least 13 years old to create an account or submit content.

Community contributions

You may submit locations, court details, open play schedules, reviews, photos, reports, suggested edits, and related information. You are responsible for what you submit and must have the rights needed to share it.

By submitting content, you give Scoop Pickleball and Open Play Map a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to host, store, reproduce, display, modify for formatting or moderation, distribute, and use that content to operate, promote, and improve the service.

Reviews and location information

  • Reviews should reflect your real experience with the court, park, or open play session.
  • Do not submit fake reviews, paid reviews, misleading reviews, or reviews written on behalf of someone else.
  • Location information may be wrong, incomplete, out of date, or changed by a facility without notice.
  • Always confirm important details, follow posted rules, respect facility staff, and use your own judgment before playing.

Photos

Only upload photos you took or have permission to share. Do not upload photos that invade privacy, identify children without permission, show private information, violate facility rules, infringe someone else's rights, or contain unsafe, harassing, explicit, or unrelated content.

Prohibited conduct

  • No harassment, hate, threats, doxxing, spam, scams, malware, scraping abuse, or attempts to bypass security.
  • No false locations, duplicate spam, reward manipulation, fake accounts, fake reviews, or misleading edits.
  • No posting personal information about other people without permission.
  • No use of the service in a way that violates law or the rights of others.

Moderation

We may review, approve, edit, hide, reject, delete, or archive content and accounts when we believe it is appropriate for accuracy, quality, safety, legal, trust, or operational reasons. We are not required to publish every submission or explain every moderation decision.

Rewards and credits

Credits and paddle drawings are beta features. Credits have no cash value, are not transferable, and do not guarantee a prize. No purchase is necessary to participate where rewards are offered. Eligibility, prize details, odds, winner confirmation, timing, geographic availability, and any additional official rules may be updated before a reward is awarded.

We may withhold, remove, or reset credits tied to spam, fake activity, duplicate submissions, policy violations, technical errors, or attempts to manipulate the reward system.

Open Play Map is informational

The service provides community-submitted information. It is not a reservation system, official park or facility schedule, safety service, legal guide, or professional advice. We do not control courts, facilities, player conduct, weather, closures, fees, injuries, property conditions, or the accuracy of third-party information.

Intellectual property

Open Play Map, Scoop Pickleball branding, site design, software, logos, and related materials are owned by Scoop Pickleball or its licensors. You may not copy, reuse, or exploit them except as allowed by law or with permission. Copyright concerns can be reported through the Copyright Policy.

Service changes

We may add, change, pause, or discontinue features at any time. We may suspend or terminate access if you violate these terms, create risk for other users, or misuse the service.

Disclaimers and liability

The service is provided "as is" and "as available." To the fullest extent allowed by law, Scoop Pickleball disclaims warranties and is not liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, exemplary, or punitive damages, or for lost profits, lost data, personal injury, property damage, or issues caused by user content, court conditions, facility rules, or third-party conduct.

Contact

Questions about these terms can be sent to scooppickleball@gmail.com.
